intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar palabras de ropa.

sample_sentences.en: He wears a blue shirt to work.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ele usa uma camisa azul para o trabalho.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Lleva una camisa azul al trabajo.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il porte une chemise bleue au travail.

sample_sentences.en: Her shoes are by the door.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Os sapatos dela estão perto da porta.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Sus zapatos están junto a la puerta.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ses chaussures sont près de la porte.

sample_sentences.en: She bought a dress for the party.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela comprou um vestido para a festa.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Compró un vestido para la fiesta.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle a acheté une robe pour la fête.

sample_sentences.en: Take your jacket because it is cold outside.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Leve sua jaqueta porque está frio lá fora.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Lleva tu chaqueta porque hace frío fuera.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Prends ta veste parce qu'il fait froid dehors.

sample_sentences.en: That hat looks good on you.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Esse chapéu fica bem em você.

sample_sentences.en: I need clean socks for tomorrow.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu preciso de meias limpas para amanhã.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: J'ai besoin de chaussettes propres pour demain.

sample_sentences.en: Her coat is hanging in the hall.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O casaco dela está pendurado no corredor.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Su abrigo está colgado en el pasillo.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Son manteau est accroché dans le couloir.

sample_sentences.en: This belt is made of leather.
She wrapped a scarf around her neck.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela enrolou um cachecol no pescoço.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Se puso una bufanda alrededor del cuello.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle a mis une écharpe autour du cou.
